## Checklist
- [ ] Code lints without errors (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No real credentials, PII, or survivor data in code or logs
- [ ] Tested on mobile (this is a PWA used in the field)
- [ ] Offline behaviour verified if touching data sync code
